headline: The Pentagon Just Handed nLight A New Story
summary: A single defense contract can change a company's trajectory, but it's the sheer size of this one that sent shares flying.

headline: 2 Value Stocks with Promising Prospects and 1 That Underwhelm
summary: Value investing has produced some of the world’s most famous investing billionaires, including Warren Buffett, David Einhorn, and Seth Klarman, who built their fortunes by purchasing wonderful businesses at reasonable prices. But these hidden gems are few and far between - many stocks that appear cheap often stay that way because they face structural issues.

raw.headline: 2 Value Stocks with Promising Prospects and 1 That Underwhelm

headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on First Solar, Raises Price Target to $270
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Biju Perincheril   maintains First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) with a Positive and raises the price target from $250 to $270.
